title: All mobs are boatable
description: All mobs can be put into a boat
body:
Some mobs can not be put into a boat, because their hitbox is wider than the boat's. This datapack makes it so these mobs can be put into boats, without changing their hitboxes.

**Mobs that are not normally (but are now) boatable (can be put into a boat):**
- Bat
- Camel (adult)
- Creaking
- Donkey (adult)
- Ender dragon
- Ghast
- Hoglin (adult)
- Iron golem
- Magma cube (large)
- Mule (adult)
- Polar bear (adult)
- Ravager
- Skeleton horse (adult)
- Slime (large)
- Sniffer (adult)
- Spider
- Warden
- Wither
- Zoglin (adult)
- Zombie horse (adult)

**Water creatures have been left out, so fish and dolphins are not boatable**

# Problem? - BobuarThereIsSomethingWrongWithYourThing@outlook.com
